title: The Warrior and the Slave Girl
writer: Gian Paolo Callegari, Francesco De Feo, Gianfranco Parolini
actors: Gianna Maria Canale, Ettore Manni, Mara Cruz
plot: Marcus Numidius (Ettore Manni), a Roman tribune sent to Armenia to put down a gladiators' revolt, captures the rebels' popular leader, Aselepius (Georges Marchal). Princess Amira (Gianna Maria Canale), with ambitions of being Quee...
